SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-01-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDA OWYEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REBECCA LANDEROS IS NOT PRESENT. 3 PREVIOUSLY ATTEMPTED SERVICES BY CERTIFED MAIL HAVE BEEN RETURNED AS UNSIGNED. ALL 3 ATTMEPTED SERVICE HAVE BEEN MAILED TO A P.O. BOX ADDRESS. 2 ATTEMPTS HAVE BEEN MADE TO THE FRANCHISE TAX BOARD. DATE WAS REQEUSTED BY PLAINTIFF AND NOT WISH TO HAVE A LATER DATE TO ALLOW MORE TIME TO PROPERLY SERVE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OWYEUNG, LINDA Y (DBA: G & O TAX SERVICE) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LANDEROS, REBECCA (FTB) CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. TIME BARRED-STATUE OF LIMITATIONS PASSED. THEFT WAS DISCOVERED BETWEEN OCTOBER 24, 2016- NOVEMBER 4, 2016. THE CLAIM WAS FILED MORE THAN FIVE YEARS LATER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-25-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT DEEMS THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON JANUARY 12, 2022, IS NOT VALID. CERTIFIED PROOF OF SERVICE WAS MAILED TO A P.O. BOX AND THE RETRUN SERVICE IS NOT SIGNED. PLAINTIFF LINDA Y. OWYEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REBECCA LANDEROS IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
